prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年物理类最低位次分别为427→526→577→524→696名，整体呈波动上升趋势（位次数字增大=竞争加剧），近3年累计后移约119名；2025年基准位次约696名，较2024年大幅上升172名，显示报考热度显著升温；该校在辽宁省物理类招生计划2021–2024年均为15人，2025年增至16人；2026年计划18人，较2025年扩招2人（+12.5%），扩招幅度较为明显，理论上可缓解部分竞争压力。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 北京大学医学部隶属北京大学，985/211/双一流建设高校，软科主榜北京大学第2名（2026年），医学部为国内顶尖医学院校，层次极高，对高分考生吸引力持续强劲；2026年声誉周期内北京大学整体评价偏负面（主要涉及校园安全、宿舍政策等），但医学部作为独立招生单元受影响有限；抖音热度排名第3（高热），短视频曝光量极大，反映社会关注度居高不下；未见明显投档断档记录；临床医学A、口腔医学A、基础医学A、药学A+、护理学A+等均为A-/A/A+级学科，与招生专业高度对应，学科实力全国顶尖，对考生有强吸引力。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 临床医学、口腔医学等专业持续高热推荐（2024年临床医学，口腔医学=72.31），医学类专业报考热度居高不下；辽宁省2026年普通高考考生约20万人，物理类估算约14.36万人，与2025年基本持平，竞争环境稳定；北京大学医学部位于北京，对辽宁省考生属跨省报考，无本地招生倾斜。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合历年位次持续上移趋势（尤其2025年大幅跃升）、医学类专业社会热度持续高热、2026年扩招12.5%部分缓解竞争等因素，在2025年基准696名基础上预计位次继续小幅上移；预测最低位次约760名，区间674–846名。

major_tier_recommendation.tier_1:
一档（最难进）
- 临床医学（八年制本博连读）
- 口腔医学（八年制本博连读）
- 口腔医学（五年制）。
major_tier_recommendation.tier_2:
二档（中等）
- 临床医学（五年制）
- 基础医学（八年制本博连读）
- 药学（六年制本硕连读）。
major_tier_recommendation.tier_3:
三档（相对好进）
- 预防医学（七年制本硕连读）
- 医学技术类（医学检验技术、医学影像技术）
- 英语（医学英语）。
major_tier_recommendation.overall_advice: 位次在预测区间674–846名内，建议以二档专业为主攻方向、一档专业冲刺、三档专业保底；位次明显优于区间下限（如670名以内）可重点冲刺八年制临床/口腔等王牌专业；位次接近区间上限（如840名附近）应以三档专业为稳妥选择。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for Physics Category were 427 → 526 → 577 → 524 → 696, showing an overall fluctuating upward trend (larger ranking number = increased competition). In the past 3 years, the ranking has shifted backward by about 119 places. The baseline ranking for 2025 is approximately 696, a significant increase of 172 places from 2024, indicating a notable rise in application popularity. The enrollment plan for this university in Liaoning's Physics Category was 15 students from 2021 to 2024, increasing to 16 in 2025. The 2026 plan is 18 students, an increase of 2 students (+12.5%) compared to 2025, which is a relatively significant expansion and theoretically could alleviate some competitive pressure.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Peking University Health Science Center is affiliated with Peking University, a 985/211/Double First-Class university. On the Soft Science main ranking, Peking University ranks 2nd (2026). The Health Science Center is a top-tier medical school in China, with an extremely high level, continuously attracting high-scoring students. In the 2026 reputation cycle, Peking University's overall evaluation is somewhat negative (mainly related to campus safety, dormitory policies, etc.), but the Health Science Center, as an independent enrollment unit, is less affected. It ranks 3rd in Douyin popularity (high heat), with massive short video exposure, reflecting sustained high social attention. No significant enrollment gaps have been recorded. Clinical Medicine (A), Stomatology (A), Basic Medicine (A), Pharmacy (A+), Nursing (A+), etc., are all A-/A/A+ level disciplines, highly corresponding to the enrollment majors, with top-tier national academic strength, strongly attracting candidates.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Majors such as Clinical Medicine and Stomatology continue to be highly recommended (2024: Clinical Medicine, Stomatology = 72.31), with medical majors maintaining high application popularity. In 2026, Liaoning Province has approximately 200,000 general college entrance examination candidates, with an estimated 143,600 in the Physics Category, roughly the same as 2025, indicating a stable competitive environment. Peking University Health Science Center is located in Beijing, so for Liaoning candidates, it is an inter-provincial application with no local enrollment preference.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the continuous upward trend in historical rankings (especially the significant jump in 2025), the sustained high social heat of medical majors, and the 12.5% enrollment expansion in 2026 partially alleviating competition, based on the 2025 baseline ranking of 696, the ranking is expected to continue to rise slightly. The predicted minimum ranking is approximately 760, with a range of 674–846.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_1:
Tier 1 (Hardest to Enter)
- Clinical Medicine (Eight-Year MD-PhD Program)
- Stomatology (Eight-Year MD-PhD Program)
- Stomatology (Five-Year Program)
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:
Tier 2 (Moderate)
- Clinical Medicine (Five-Year Program)
- Basic Medicine (Eight-Year MD-PhD Program)
- Pharmacy (Six-Year Bachelor-Master Program)
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easier to Enter)
- Preventive Medicine (Seven-Year Bachelor-Master Program)
- Medical Technology (Medical Laboratory Technology, Medical Imaging Technology)
- English (Medical English)
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: If your ranking is within the predicted range of 674–846, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors as the main direction, aim for Tier 1 majors as a stretch, and use Tier 3 majors as a safety net. If your ranking is significantly better than the lower limit of the range (e.g., within 670), you can focus on aiming for top-tier majors like the eight-year Clinical Medicine/Stomatology. If your ranking is close to the upper limit of the range (e.g., around 840), you should choose Tier 3 majors as a safe option.
